simple_types.name: gsl_filter_end_t
simple_types.code:
type gsl_filter_end_t is
  (GSL_FILTER_END_PADZERO, GSL_FILTER_END_PADVALUE,
   GSL_FILTER_END_TRUNCATE) with
   Convention => C;

simple_types.name: gsl_filter_scale_t
simple_types.code:
type gsl_filter_scale_t is
  (GSL_FILTER_SCALE_MAD, GSL_FILTER_SCALE_IQR, GSL_FILTER_SCALE_SN,
   GSL_FILTER_SCALE_QN) with
   Convention => C;

record_types.name: gsl_filter_gaussian_workspace
gsl_filter_impulse_workspace
gsl_filter_median_workspace
gsl_filter_rmedian_workspace

subprograms.name: gaussian
gaussian_alloc
subprograms.code:
function gaussian_alloc
  (K : size_t)
   return access gsl_filter_gaussian_workspace

subprograms.name: gaussian_kernel
subprograms.code:
function gaussian_kernel
  (alpha  : double; order : size_t; normalize : int;
   kernel : access gsl.vector_double.gsl_vector)
   return int

subprograms.name: impulse
impulse_alloc
subprograms.code:
function impulse_alloc
  (K : size_t)
   return access gsl_filter_impulse_workspace

subprograms.name: median
median_alloc

function median_alloc

subprograms.name: rmedian
